ideas.name: foundational-complex-physics-root-axiom
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: ROOT: An agent develops real capability only inside a world whose laws are rich and cannot be bent — the same way intelligence in the real world is shaped by a physics it cannot cheat.

ideas.name: manage-idea-packages-graph-database
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Declarative package manager — build, apply manifests, check licenses, verify proofs

ideas.name: compile-ipm-specifications-to-c
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Self-hosting compiler — converts .ipm specifications to correct-by-construction C

ideas.name: build-file-dependency-graph-json
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Pure filter stdin→stdout — produces category-structured dependency graph from scan-filesystem output

ideas.name: resolve-secrets-config-from-file
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Secrets and configuration broker — resolves keys from config file, enforces permissions

ideas.name: probe-database-through-unix-socket
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Database client library — sends parameterized SQL over Unix socket to db-proxy

ideas.name: gate-sql-via-unix-socket
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Database proxy daemon — sole libpq owner, enforces per-caller SQL gate

ideas.name: check-json-file-timestamp-age
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Check if a JSON file's timestamp field is within a max age (file-age)

ideas.name: create-forgejo-repos-via-api
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Forgejo REST API client: repo create/list, release create, issue create

ideas.name: send-and-fetch-email-messages
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Email client: SMTP send + IMAP fetch via libcurl

ideas.name: resolve-all-runtime-paths-dynamically
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Dynamic runtime path resolution for all Vehir processes

ideas.name: check-pain-write-signals-mode
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Pain signal library — writes pain_registry through db-proxy, reads cognitive mode

ideas.name: hash-and-validate-constitution-sections
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: SOUL.md section hash validator — drift detection via SHA256, re-baseline

ideas.name: apply-git-config-via-broker
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Declarative git identity — reads from broker config, applies git config --local

ideas.name: generate-readme-from-idea-graph
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Replace <!-- IDEA-GRAPH --> marker with ipm show --md output

ideas.name: listen-change-regenerate-tools-context
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Event-driven daemon — LISTENs for IPM graph changes via PostgreSQL NOTIFY, regenerates tool context block

ideas.name: emit-tools-context-from-graph
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Emit TOOLS.md agent-context file from IPM graph (ipm status → one-liner per working tool)

ideas.name: check-spec2c-conformance-fully-automatic
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Conformance checker for spec2c-generated C tools — verifies SOUL compliance via ast-grep

ideas.name: rescore-memory-with-msa-attention
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: MSA-4B daemon — neural rerank over memory bank via Unix socket. GPU/Python exception per SOUL §7

ideas.name: generate-dense-vectors-with-qwen3
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Qwen3-Embedding-4B service — 2560-dim normalized embeddings via transformers 4-bit

ideas.name: auto-switch-embed-rerank-gpu
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Vehir unified GPU daemon — serves both embeddings (always-on) and MSA rerank (on-demand). GPU exception per SOUL §7

ideas.name: scan-filesystem-with-nftw-walk
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: nftw-based filesystem scanner — outputs JSON lines, 72 LOC, 3ms

ideas.name: audit-directory-and-count-lines
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: IPM audit template — counts files, lines, duplicates in source tree

ideas.name: extract-ipm-metadata-to-json
ideas.author: Grigorii Tropin + Vehir
ideas.description: Reads .ipm file → extracts metadata as JSON

compat_rules.reason: Apache-2.0 is compatible with itself — same license
Apache-2.0 socket link — no code coupling, compatible
Apache-2.0 conceptual link — no code coupling
License-free axiom concept linked to Apache-2.0 idea — no code coupling
License-free idea linked via library — no code coupling, compatible
License-free idea linked via library — no code coupling, compatible
License-free idea linked via socket — no code coupling, compatible
License-free idea linked via socket — no code coupling, compatible
License-free idea linked via conceptual — no code coupling, compatible
